Update Mod (assets).commandLineArgs: -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$dst = '$(ProjectDir)bin\$(Configuration)\Mods\mod'; if (-not (Test-Path $dst)) { throw 'Build the mod once (Client) before using this action.' }; Copy-Item -Path '$(ProjectDir)assets' -Destination $dst -Recurse -Force; Copy-Item -Path '$(ProjectDir)modinfo.json' -Destination $dst -Force; Write-Host 'Mod assets synced to' $dst '- load a world to apply.'"
